data_domains.retention_gate: Projektleitung + Owner bestaetigen Projektablage, Aufbewahrung und Loeschfrist.
Owner bestaetigt Rechtekette, Lizenzstatus und Public-Safe-Grenze.
Owner + Datenschutz Review bestaetigen Consent, Retention und Offboarding.
Owner bestaetigt, welche Entscheide rechtlich relevant gespeichert werden.
Ausbildner + Owner bestaetigen, ob Lernhistorie ueberhaupt gespeichert werden darf.

checks.label: Data governance contract status is ready.
Data governance contract is static review-only.
All required data domains are present.
Every data domain has preview scope, future storage scope, retention gate, backup gate and blocked actions.
Local JSON preview, local office store and external exchange lanes are present.
Every storage lane blocks writes or sync today.
All sensitive data capabilities are blocked today.
Component imports the data governance contract.
Component renders data governance boundary copy.
Component states D1 writes, R2 uploads, customer writes, backup jobs and external sync are blocked.
Orbit route imports the data governance component.
Orbit route renders a data-governance anchor.
Section index links to data governance.

next_actions: Use this contract before implementing any local Orbit database, backup job or persistent office memory.
Keep all /orbit data reads static until storage, retention and privacy rules are approved.
Connect this governance contract to future KosmoData, KosmoAsset and Local Identity storage work.
